seoTitle: How to Set Up Auto Reply in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to set up automatic replies in Freshdesk so customers get an instant acknowledgment as soon as they submit a ticket.
intro: An auto reply reassures customers their request was received while your team works through the queue. This guide shows how to configure automatic ticket acknowledgment emails in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Open automation or email settings
steps.body: In the admin panel, find the section covering email notifications or automatic ticket responses.

steps.heading: Enable the auto reply feature
steps.body: Turn on the automatic acknowledgment email for new tickets if it isn't already active.

steps.heading: Customize the message
steps.body: Edit the auto reply template to include your branding, expected response time, or helpful links.

steps.heading: Save and test
steps.body: Save your changes and submit a test ticket to confirm the auto reply sends as expected.

faq.question: Does Freshdesk send auto replies by default?
faq.answer: Freshdesk typically has a default acknowledgment email you can customize rather than needing to build one from scratch.

faq.question: Can I customize the auto reply message?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit the wording, add your branding, and include dynamic fields like the customer's name or ticket number.

faq.question: Will customers get an auto reply for every ticket?
faq.answer: Yes, once enabled, auto replies typically trigger for every new ticket submitted through your channels.

faq.question: Can I set different auto replies for different channels?
faq.answer: Freshdesk allows some channel-specific customization, so check your automation settings for per-channel options.
